sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ إِلَى الْمَسْرَحِ لِمُشَاهَدَةِ مَسْرَحِيَّةٍ عَرَبِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je prvi put otišla u pozorište da gleda arapsku predstavu.
sentences.translationEn: The family went to the theatre for the first time to watch an Arabic play.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الأَطْفَالُ فِي الصَّفِّ الأَمَامِيِّ وَفَتَحُوا أَعْيُنَهُمْ عَلَى اتِّسَاعِهَا.
sentences.translation: Djeca su sjela u prednji red i otvorila oči koliko god su mogla.
sentences.translationEn: The children sat in the front row and opened their eyes as wide as they could.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أُسْدِلَ السِّتَارُ، بَدَأَتِ الْقِصَّةُ وَنَسِيَ الْجَمِيعُ أَنَّهُمْ فِي مَسْرَحٍ.
sentences.translation: Kad je zavjesa pala, priča je počela i svi su zaboravili da su u pozorištu.
sentences.translationEn: When the curtain fell, the story began and everyone forgot they were in a theatre.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكُوا وَبَكَوْا مَعَ الشَّخْصِيَّاتِ كَأَنَّهُمْ يَعْرِفُونَهَا.
sentences.translation: Smijali su se i plakali s likovima kao da ih odavno poznaju.
sentences.translationEn: They laughed and cried with the characters as if they had always known them.

sentences.arabic: فِي الطَّرِيقِ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ، قَالَ الطِّفْلُ الصَّغِيرُ: «أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مُمَثِّلًا يَوْمًا مَا.»
sentences.translation: Na putu kući mali dječak je rekao: „Jednog dana hoću biti glumac."
sentences.translationEn: On the way home, the little boy said: "One day I want to be an actor."
